sites.context: Inside updateClassInstance (bail-out path that fires when shouldComponentUpdate is going to return false but `getSnapshotBeforeUpdate` is defined): `workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot;`
Inside updateClassInstance (shouldUpdate=true path — the regular update-with-side-effects branch): `workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot;`
Inside completeWork (host root client-render fallback after hydration revert): `workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot;`

purpose: Flag fibers for getSnapshotBeforeUpdate scheduling — in class component update paths (three branches of shouldUpdate logic) and in the host-root hydration-revert fallback to client rendering.
notes: 4 sites; branch labels verified against shouldUpdate / getSnapshotBeforeUpdate searches.
